description: A salesperson asks a Professional Services consultant to estimate the number of hours required for a potential project.

nodes.task_description: Review the high-level requirements from the salesperson.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant understands the scope of the potential project.

nodes.task_description: Break down the requirements into standard implementation tasks.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant creates a work breakdown structure.

nodes.task_description: Use a standard estimation model to assign hours to each task and provide a total estimate to the salesperson.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant provides an accurate and defensible estimate.
